# service/coffee/errors

> **Service Layer**

Tagged error types for the coffee domain.

## Remarks

Each error extends [Data.TaggedError](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/), which adds a discriminant
`_tag` property to the `Error` subclass.  This enables exhaustive
pattern matching via `Effect.catchTag` in service and controller
layers without resorting to `instanceof` checks.

## Classes

| Class                                                 | Description                                                         |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [CoffeeNotFoundError](classes/CoffeeNotFoundError.md) | Error raised when a requested coffee drink cannot be found by name. |
